## Goal

Bootstrap this repository into a new project based on the specifications below.

This repository started from a template that includes an example Python/FastAPI app. Replace template-specific content with the new project setup.

### Instructions

1. Replace all placeholders (**my-project-template**) using the real project name and details.
2. Follow instructions in comment blocks that start with **TODO(bootstrap)**, then remove those TODO comment blocks.
3. Update template-specific FastAPI/Python example code and dependencies to match the new project requirements.
4. Keep the initial project minimal. Delete files that are unnecessary for the requested stack.
5. Preserve useful repository automation (for example, CI, lint, test, or devcontainer setup) only if still relevant.
6. Delete bootstrap-only content, such as this prompt and any instructions related to bootstrapping. For example:

    - .github/prompts/bootstrap.prompt.md
    - .github/skills/devcontainer-cli

7. Update README.md with concise setup and usage instructions specific to the new project.

### Verification

Verify with dev container CLI that the project is ready to run, by building and running the container, and ensuring that all commands work (`make ci`) as expected.

Once verified, delete bootstrap-only content such as this prompt, agent skills, and any instructions related to bootstrapping.
